patterns.what_worked: Standard dependency update path. Clear version pinning in lockfile.
patterns.what_was_hard: Transitive dependency conflict required manual resolution order.
patterns.skill_gap: No handling for Gradle Kotlin DSL projects.
patterns.tsg_gap: Missing rollback steps for multi-module projects.
patterns.improvisation: Adapted single-module rollback pattern to multi-module. Untested.
patterns.recurring_pattern: Third time this week seeing this transitive conflict.
